title: SP FUNDS S&P 500 SHARIA INDUSTRY EXCLUSIONS ETF (SPUS)
full_text: The SP Funds S&P 500 Sharia Industry Exclusions ETF (SPUS) tracks the S&P 500 Sharia Industry Exclusions Index, focusing on Sharia-compliant large-cap US equities by excluding industries like alcohol, gambling, and conventional finance. As of early 2026, SPUS is heavily weighted toward technology, with top holdings including Nvidia, Apple, and Microsoft, due to the exclusion of non-compliant financial firms. Investors can trade SPUS with 0 commission fees on Moomoo, a licensed entity regulated by the Securities Commission Malaysia.
